_comment: SLICE_S2_CONTRACT.md §10.4 — checked-in fixtures only; production content never becomes eval data. Build-phase (Phase 2) full N=20 set: EVERY prompt asks the real local-transport model for STRICT JSON matching the shared one-property schema {"answer": string} (the contract's own neutral envelope carries StructuredOutputSchema as a documented field; the schema itself is conveyed via the system prompt since neither transport enforces JSON mode server-side yet — this eval measures whether prompting alone reliably yields conforming output, which is exactly what a structured-output-schema-conformance eval is for). Each entry's expectedSubstring is checked case-insensitively against the parsed answer value, never the raw text, so conformance and content-correctness are scored as two separate, both-required conditions. Deliberately short questions + low maxTokens (EvalProbeConformanceTests.cs) keep this the cheap $ path per SLICE_S2_CONTRACT.md §9's per-eval cost discipline.
systemPromptTemplate: Respond with ONLY strict JSON matching this schema: {"answer": string}. No prose, no markdown code fences, no extra keys, no explanation — the entire response body must be one JSON object.

prompts.userText: What is the single word for the sound a cat makes? Answer in one word.
What color do you get from mixing red and white paint? One word.
What is 2 + 2? Reply with the digit only.
What is the capital of France? One word.
What is the chemical symbol for water? No spaces.
How many days are in a week? Digit only.
What planet is known as the Red Planet? One word.
What is the opposite of 'up'? One word.
What shape has three sides? One word.
What do bees produce that people eat? One word.
What is the freezing point of water in Celsius? Digit only.
What is the first letter of the English alphabet? One letter, lowercase.
What animal is known as man's best friend? One word.
How many legs does a spider have? Digit only.
What is the largest ocean on Earth? One or two words.
What season comes after winter? One word.
What gas do plants absorb from the air for photosynthesis? Give the common name, one or two words.
What is the square root of 9? Digit only.
What metal is liquid at room temperature? One word.
What do you call a baby dog? One word.
